verdict.label: Marginal
verdict.headline: Lagide After work
verdict.reason: There is a possible after work at Lagide, but the sources are not strong enough for a confident call.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Lagide looks like a fun-sized window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 80 kJ, 8 s period, workable consistency 54/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
best.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label Fun progression, Medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 80 kJ · 8 s period · wind is not fully clear.

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 66 kJ, 8 s period, workable consistency 47/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Watch: Cerro may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is a sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent · label Worth checking, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 66 kJ · 8 s period · wind is not fully clear · Watch: Cerro may feel too soft without more push.

ranked.explanation: Cantinho da Baia looks like a fun-sized window for Safe fun, Low confidence: not captured, energy not captured, 8 s period, and wind is the main risk.  A forgiving sandy bay with lots of take-off points; this is best for easy wave count and cleaner faces when the north wind is bothering exposed beaches.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 66 kJ, 8 s period, lully 22/100, and good wind at 14 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; exposed north spot needs Lagide to be under 1 m.
